items.name: 1Panel
items.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

items.name: patina
items.description: Detects and rewrites AI writing patterns in Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese. Runs as a skill for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, and OpenCode, or as a standalone Node.js CLI.

items.name: helmor
items.description: Open-source local workbench for multi-agent software development.

items.name: studio
items.description: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar

items.name: costrict
items.description: Costrict - strict AI coder for enterprises, quality first, including AI Agent, AI CodeReview, AI Completion.

items.name: lean-ctx
items.description: Control what your AI can see. LeanCTX (Lean Context) is the context intelligence layer for AI agents — one local Rust binary that decides what they read, remembers what they learn, guards what they touch, and proves what they save. 60–90% fewer tokens as the receipt. 76 MCP tools, 30+ agents, local-first.

items.name: claude_codex_bridge
items.description: Visible multi-agent CLI teams for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and Droid with project memory and tmux supervision

items.name: ai-engineering-from-scratch-zh
items.description: Agent工程师最全学习路径 · 从零精通 AI 工程 · 20 阶段 503 课 · 中文全量翻译 + 配套站点 · 如何成为 AI Agent 工程师的修成指南

items.name: crewAI
items.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

items.name: vexjoy-agent
items.description: VexJoy AI Agent with Intelligent Routing - /do routes plain-English requests to the right specialist agent and gates the work with reviews, tests, and a learning loop.
